title: Scaffold Firebase emulator config + Nx targets + app initialization

project.description: Name of the Angular app to wire (firebase.config.ts is generated under its src/app, and its serve target is wrapped to start the emulator suite).

workspaceName.description: Workspace name used to build the offline emulator project id (`demo-<name>`) — passed via --project to each `firebase emulators:start` Nx target and used inside firebase.config.ts's emulator config. Defaults to the project name. (Not written to .firebaserc — that's the Firebase CLI's responsibility.)
